title: [FIRRTL] canonicalizer failure with mux of const-mixed operands
body:
I came across the following circuit which is failing IMCP:

``` mlir
firrtl.circuit "Foo" {
  firrtl.module @Foo(out %a : !firrtl.uint<1>, in %b : !firrtl.uint<1>) {
    %c0_ui1 = firrtl.constant 0 : !firrtl.const.uint<1>
    %c = firrtl.mux(%b, %c0_ui1, %c0_ui1) : (!firrtl.uint<1>, !firrtl.const.uint<1>, !firrtl.const.uint<1>) -> !firrtl.uint<1>
    firrtl.matchingconnect %a, %c : !firrtl.uint<1>
  }
}
```

Compiling this with `circt-opt Foo.mlir -firrtl-imconstprop` produces:

```
Foo.mlir:4:10: error: 'firrtl.mux' op folder produced a value of incorrect type: '!firrtl.uint<1>', expected: '!firrtl.const.uint<1>'
    %c = firrtl.mux(%b, %c0_ui1, %c0_ui1) : (!firrtl.uint<1>, !firrtl.const.uint<1>, !firrtl.const.uint<1>) -> !firrtl.uint<1>
         ^
Foo.mlir:4:10: note: see current operation: %1 = "firrtl.mux"(%arg1, %0, %0) : (!firrtl.uint<1>, !firrtl.const.uint<1>, !firrtl.const.uint<1>) -> !firrtl.uint<1>
Assertion failed: (false && "incorrect fold result type"), function checkFoldResultTypes, file Operation.cpp, line 624.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.	Program arguments: circt-opt Foo.mlir -firrtl-imconstprop
Stack dump without symbol names (ensure you have llvm-symbolizer in your PATH or set the environment var `LLVM_SYMBOLIZER_PATH` to point to it):
0  circt-opt                0x000000010240adc0 llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) + 56
1  circt-opt                0x00000001024092c0 llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() + 112

3  libsystem_platform.dylib 0x000000019f46a584 _sigtramp + 56

5  libsystem_c.dylib        0x000000019f346a30 abort + 180
6  libsystem_c.dylib        0x000000019f345d20 err + 0

9  circt-opt                0x0000000102ad6e28 (anonymous namespace)::IMConstPropPass::visitOperation(mlir::Operation*, circt::FieldRef) + 1800
10 circt-opt                0x0000000102ad4ef8 (anonymous namespace)::IMConstPropPass::runOnOperation() + 960

```
